requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Grenada PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——格林纳达光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——格瑞那達光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Grenada's PV inverter EMC review should be prepared on an IEC basis because the market follows UK/IEC legacy practice and local project review involves GDBS standards context, PURC regulation, and GRENLEC utility acceptance. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series tests address immunity, emissions, harmonics, and flicker depending on inverter rating and connection type. No automatic acceptance of Chinese domestic EMC certificates should be assumed for Grenada projects.
summary.zh: 格林纳达光伏逆变器EMC审查应按IEC路径准备，因为该市场具有英国/IEC传统，本地项目审查涉及GDBS标准背景、PURC监管和GRENLEC公用事业接受。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列测试则根据逆变器额定值和接入类型覆盖抗扰度、发射、谐波和闪变。不得假设中国国内EMC证书会被格林纳达项目自动接受。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達光伏逆變器EMC審查應按IEC路徑準備，因為該市場具有英國/IEC傳統，本地項目審查涉及GDBS標準背景、PURC監管和GRENLEC公用事業接受。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列測試則根據逆變器額定值和接入類型覆蓋抗擾度、發射、諧波和閃變。不得假設中國國內EMC證書會被格瑞那達項目自動接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits relevant to emissions, immunity, harmonics, and flicker
Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) — national standards body context
GRENLEC — utility acceptance and project interconnection documentation

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly bundled into GB/T 37408-2021 or another current GB/T 37408 certificate package, supported by CNAS-accredited domestic test reports. Those reports may reference IEC 61000-family methods, but the scope, limits, test voltage, and configuration may not match an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 package expected for Grenada. China-side GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is not automatically accepted in Grenada.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常纳入GB/T 37408-2021或其他现行GB/T 37408证书包，并由CNAS认可的国内测试报告支持。此类报告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但范围、限值、测试电压和配置未必匹配格林纳达预期的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据包。中国侧GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据不会在格林纳达自动被接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常納入GB/T 37408-2021或其他現行GB/T 37408證書包，並由CNAS認可的國內測試報告支持。此類報告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但範圍、限值、測試電壓和配置未必匹配格瑞那達預期的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據包。中國側GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據不會在格瑞那達自動被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic EMC evidence should be mapped line-by-line against IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000-series tests before submission. Exporters should obtain or compile IEC EMC type-test reports for the exact inverter model, rating, firmware configuration, and grid-voltage condition being supplied. Because Grenada operates at 230/400 V and China at 220/380 V, any EMC or harmonic evidence generated at Chinese nominal voltage should be checked for applicability and retested if the project engineer, utility, or test laboratory requires it.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内EMC证据在提交前应逐项映射至IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列测试。出口商应为所供应的确切逆变器型号、额定值、固件配置和电网电压条件取得或汇编IEC EMC型式试验报告。由于格林纳达为230/400 V、中国为220/380 V，凡在中国标称电压下生成的EMC或谐波证据，均应检查适用性；如项目工程师、公用事业公司或测试实验室要求，应重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內EMC證據在提交前應逐項映射至IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列測試。出口商應為所供應的確切逆變器型號、額定值、韌體配置和電網電壓條件取得或彙編IEC EMC型式試驗報告。由於格瑞那達為230/400 V、中國為220/380 V，凡在中國標稱電壓下生成的EMC或諧波證據，均應檢查適用性；如項目工程師、公用事業公司或測試實驗室要求，應重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where GRENLEC, PURC, project-owner, or lender technical specifications require IEC EMC evidence for grid-tied PV inverter acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence under GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 supports China domestic certification files but does not transfer automatically to Grenada project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China GB/T 37408 EMC certificate alone for Grenada PV inverter submissions. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series EMC evidence for the specific inverter model and confirm whether 230/400 V Grenada operating conditions require retesting compared with China 220/380 V evidence. Verify the current GDBS, PURC, GRENLEC, and project-owner EMC expectations before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书提交格林纳达光伏逆变器资料。请为特定逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列EMC证据，并确认相较于中国220/380 V证据，格林纳达230/400 V运行条件是否需要重新测试。出货前请核实现行GDBS、PURC、GRENLEC及项目业主的EMC预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書提交格瑞那達光伏逆變器資料。請為特定逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列EMC證據，並確認相較於中國220/380 V證據，格瑞那達230/400 V運行條件是否需要重新測試。出貨前請核實現行GDBS、PURC、GRENLEC及項目業主的EMC預期。
